justification: Vibration/resonance massage tool for headache is not framed with a fascial rationale, despite reporting GAD-7/PHQ-9/PTSD measures.
Fascia iliaca nerve block trial reports only pain, quadriceps strength, opioid use, and hip function; no psychological outcome.
Finite element biomechanical simulation of chiropractic manipulation; reports stress/displacement, no emotional or psychological outcome.
Foot reflexology for lactation and post-cesarean pain; not a fascial intervention and outcomes (LATCH, VAS) are not psychological.
Review of biomaterial miRNA delivery for fibrous tissue in preclinical models; no human data or psychological outcome.
Commentary on academic medicine department leadership; 'structural integration' is organizational, unrelated to fascia or psychology.
Scoping review of autologous-tissue sacrocolpopexy surgery; no original interventional data and no psychological outcome.
Psychometric validation study of a limb-difference PROM; no fascia intervention applied.
Neural progenitor cell transplants studied in opossum and rat models; not human participants.
Finite element analysis of bone-setting manipulation for fractures; reports stress/displacement, no psychological outcome.
Anatomical discussion of fascial planes in colorectal surgery; no intervention with psychological outcomes.
Abdominal massage plus moxibustion for constipation; not framed as fascial and outcomes are bowel/QoL, not validated psychological.
RCT of dry needling for masticatory myofascial pain reporting depressive symptoms via Beck Depression Inventory; plausibly meets all criteria.
Fascia lata flap reconstruction of knee defects; reports surgical complications and function, no psychological outcome.
Self-myofascial release intervention measuring HRV (RMSSD, LF/HF) and cardiovascular stress reaction; physiological affect markers meet criteria.
Case report of multimodal PT including myofascial release; outcomes are pain, disability, strength, no psychological instrument.
Donor-site morbidity after latissimus flap in children; reports DASH/SPADI function scores, no psychological outcome.
Commentary on MBSR mindfulness for student mental health; mindfulness is not a fascial intervention.
Surface EMG study of plantar fascia windlass stimulation; outcomes are muscle activation, no psychological measure.
OMT including myofascial release for dizziness; Dizziness Handicap Inventory has an emotional subscale, cannot confidently rule out.
